headline.purpose: Section headers in parent mode, group labels.

title.purpose: Card titles, list items, dialog headings. The workhorse.

label.purpose: Metadata, counts, duration counters. Small but never light.

shadows.name: ambient-art
shadows.purpose: Player album art only. Soft lift for large cover.

shadows.name: drag-feedback
shadows.purpose: Green-tinted shadow when dragging tiles in parent mode.

shadows.name: badge-drop
shadows.purpose: Small shadow under floating pills like '▶ Weiter' badge.

shadows.name: card-rest
shadows.purpose: Barely-there lift for catalog hero cards in search results.

motion.name: press-scale
motion.purpose: Tactile press feedback on cards and tiles.

motion.name: nest-target
motion.purpose: Hover feedback when a tile is targeted for nesting.

motion.name: pin-dot
motion.purpose: PIN digit entry bounce. Brief and terminal.

motion.name: pin-shake
motion.purpose: Wrong PIN horizontal shake with haptic.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Filled forest-green button for primary actions. Generous padding for kid and parent thumbs.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #2D7A54; color: #FFFFFF; font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 15px; padding: 16px 48px; border: none; border-radius: 12px; min-height: 48px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #5BA37D; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Transparent button with forest-green text for secondary actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #2D7A54; font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 15px; padding: 16px 48px; border: none; border-radius: 12px; min-height: 48px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(45,122,84,0.08); }

components.name: Tile Card
components.description: Image-only card in kid mode. The art IS the card. No container, no border at rest.
components.html: Bibi und Tina
components.css: .ds-tile-card { border-radius: 16px; overflow: hidden; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.15s ease-in-out; } .ds-tile-card:hover { transform: scale(0.96); } .ds-tile-card img { width: 100%; aspect-ratio: 1; object-fit: cover; display: block; } .ds-tile-label { font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px; color: #1A1E1C; text-align: center; margin-top: 6px; line-height: 1.2; } .ds-tile-card.playing { box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px #2D7A54; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Rounded text input with green focus ring. White surface on warm cream background.
components.css: .ds-input { background: #FFFFFF; color: #1A1E1C; font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; padding: 12px 16px; border: 1px solid #E7E3CE; border-radius: 12px; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.2s ease; width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #2D7A54; border-width: 2px; padding: 11px 15px; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #ABAFAD; }

components.name: PIN Numpad Key
components.description: 72dp circular button for PIN entry. Surface background, full hit area for reliable touch injection.
components.css: .ds-numpad-key { width: 72px; height: 72px; background: #FFFFFF; color: #1A1E1C; font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 22px; border: none; border-radius: 999px; cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; transition: background 0.15s ease; } .ds-numpad-key:hover { background: #F0EDE0; } .ds-numpad-key:active { background: #E7E3CE; transform: scale(0.95); }

components.name: Progress Bar
components.description: 6dp rounded track with forest-green fill. Labels flanking.
components.css: .ds-progress { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif; } .ds-progress-time { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: #555A57; letter-spacing: 0.02em; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-progress-track { flex: 1; height: 6px; background: #E7E3CE; border-radius: 999px; overflow: hidden; position: relative; } .ds-progress-fill { height: 100%; background: #2D7A54; border-radius: 999px; transition: width 0.1s linear; }

components.name: Now Playing Bar
components.description: Compact bottom bar showing current track. Slides up when playback starts.
components.html:
Folge 23
Bibi und Tina
components.css: .ds-now-playing { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; padding: 0 16px; height: 92px; background: #FFFFFF; border-top: 1px solid #E7E3CE; font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif; } .ds-np-art { width: 64px; height: 64px; border-radius: 10px; object-fit: cover; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-np-info { flex: 1; min-width: 0; } .ds-np-title { font-weight: 700; font-size: 15px; color: #1A1E1C; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; } .ds-np-artist { font-size: 13px; color: #555A57; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; } .ds-np-play { width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 999px; background: #2D7A54; color: #FFFFFF; border: none; font-size: 20px; cursor: pointer; flex-shrink: 0; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; }

narrative.overview: The lauschi mascot is a watercolor fox — green fur, terracotta headphones, cream belly, eyes closed in contentment. The entire design system is derived from this character. The app should feel like handing a child that fox: calm, warm, trustworthy, and already listening. The kid experience is one screen, one decision. Album art is the hero; the UI recedes. Parent mode shifts to a slightly cooler, more information-dense tone, but the same fox DNA runs through both.
keyCharacteristics: Album art is the interface — text is minimal and secondary
Warm cream backgrounds let every cover pop equally
Green signals safe and calm; terracotta adds human warmth
Tactile, focused, and soft — no sharp edges, no aggressive motion
The PIN is a portal between two different experiences in one app
Neurodivergent-friendly: no continuous motion, no hidden gestures, predictable state changes

rules.name: The Album Art Rule
rules.body: UI colors are intentionally restrained so every album cover, from neon cartoon to muted photography, pops equally. If a screen feels busy, the UI is stealing from the art. Remove, don't add.

rules.name: The No-Layering-Without-Reason Rule
rules.body: If a surface doesn't need to float, it doesn't get a shadow. Most depth is communicated by color and position.

rules.name: The No-Em-Dash Rule
rules.body: Typography follows the same voice as copy: commas, colons, semicolons, periods, or parentheses. Never em-dashes or en-dashes.

dos: Do let album art dominate every screen it's on. UI chrome recedes.
Do use forest green for every primary action, active state, and playing indicator. Consistency builds trust.
Do keep touch targets at 48dp minimum, 64dp+ for kid-facing controls.
Do combine color with shape or position for state. Never color alone.
Do use spring-curve press animations (scale 0.96, 150ms) for tactile feedback.
Do keep all animations brief and terminal. No loops, no pulses, no continuous motion.
Do use Nunito for everything. One family, weight and size create hierarchy.
Do prefer inline feedback over toasts or snackbars.
Do use shimmer placeholders instead of spinners for loading states.
donts: Don't use pure black or pure white as page backgrounds. Tint neutrals toward the fox's green.
Don't use dark mode. The app is always light. Warm cream is the fox's paper.
Don't add tabs, carousels, feeds, or recommendation strips to the kid experience.
Don't use side-stripe borders on cards, lists, or callouts.
Don't use gradient text. Use weight or size for emphasis.
Don't use glassmorphism. No blurs, no frosted cards.
Don't use the hero-metric template. Not a dashboard.
Don't use modals as a first thought. Exhaust inline and progressive alternatives.
Don't rely on color alone for state. Combine with icon, shape, or position.
Don't use Spotify's dark density, over-colorful toy-store energy, or flat characterless Material defaults.
Don't use continuous animations — pulsing, spinning, bouncing loops.
Don't use em-dashes in any copy.
Don't add long-press menus, context menus, or hidden gestures in kid mode.
